headline: Palantir (PLTR) Faces Fresh UK Pressure Over NHS Contract Continuity
summary: Palantir Technologies' NHS federated data platform contract in the UK is drawing increased political scrutiny. Critics are questioning the reliance of the National Health Service on a U.S. technology provider for critical data infrastructure. A former NHS data leader has suggested that replacing Palantir before the next contract break point is unlikely, keeping attention on renewal risk. Palantir Technologies, listed as NasdaqGS:PLTR, is back in the spotlight for political reasons rather...
